TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Paridrayan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Paridrayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Paridrayan sa, 229 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 733 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 718 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 15 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 95%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: paridrajan i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu paridrajan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu paridrajan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Paridrayan i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Paridrayan. u kasalumaluma' nu Paridrayan sa, 229 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 733 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 718 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 15 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 95%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: paridrajan i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu paridrajan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu paridrajan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
